name: Wildly off stone tonnage (20t for ~1sqm)
description: Pre-baked Sonnet analysis quotes 20 tonnes of replacement stone for what the measurements imply is roughly a 1sqm wall face. The critique prompt's rule #10 (Stone tonnage range, 0.8–1.2 t/sqm) must catch this — 20 t/sqm is ~20× over. Severity should be high — at £180/t this is a £3,420 over-spec on the materials line alone.
briefNotes: Small one-metre breach in a gritstone field wall. Mostly cosmetic — single course gap.

analysis.damageDescription: A 1m breach has opened up in this double-faced gritstone field wall. Standing sections either side are sound and need only minor taking-back.

labourEstimate.calculationBasis: 1 sqm wall face at ~1 sqm/hour each, 2 wallers, 0.5 days rounded to 1

scheduleOfWorks.title: Site clearance
scheduleOfWorks.description: Clear debris and sort reclaimable stone

scheduleOfWorks.title: Rebuild
scheduleOfWorks.description: Rebuild the 1m breach double-faced with through stones

scheduleOfWorks.title: Cope and finish
scheduleOfWorks.description: Set coping stones and tidy site
